section_miscategorizations.text: The right hand x-ray demonstrates no fractures and a sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The x-ray itself is an objective test, but the statement that it 'demonstrates...a sprain' is an interpretive diagnostic impression rather than a raw observed finding. The diagnosis of a sprain belongs more appropriately in the Assessment, though this does not substantially mislead the reader.
